reasoning: Correct tool, 386 hanabi records returned. However most items lack prefecture, coordinates, and English descriptions — the agent gets a long list of Japanese-name-only entries with no scheduling or location data to present usefully to an English-speaking traveler.
missing_data: Dates/months of each fireworks event, English event descriptions, coordinates for majority of events. An English-speaking user needs when and where, not just Japanese names.
improvement_hint: Enrich hanabi entries with prefecture, coordinates, and typical month. Add date_month field from official event sources so the agent can filter by season.

reasoning: Same dataset as L3-01 with lang=ja. 386 hanabi records in Japanese. Result is comprehensive in count but most entries lack coordinates, prefecture, and event dates — limiting agent's ability to give actionable recommendations to a Japanese user.
missing_data: Event dates/month, prefecture, coordinates for the majority of items. Japanese user would still need to click through to Wikidata for basic planning info.
improvement_hint: Scrape Japanese official hanabi event pages (自治体サイト) for dates and venues. Prioritize items with coordinates and date data in the sort order.

reasoning: User asked specifically for snow festivals (雪祭り) in Hokkaido. Tool returned 0 festival items for Hokkaido and instead shows national UNESCO ICH records from Akita, Saitama, Toyama, and Mie — completely off-target. The iconic Sapporo Snow Festival is absent.
missing_data: Sapporo Snow Festival, Asahikawa Winter Festival, Towada Hakkoda snow events — all key Hokkaido snow festivals missing. Festival corpus lacks snow_festival kind_tag.
wrong_data: National UNESCO heritage items shown are not Hokkaido snow festivals — mismatch with query.
improvement_hint: Add kind_tag=snow_festival to corpus. Ensure Hokkaido-scoped festival query returns items with matching prefecture_code=01 before falling back to national heritage.

reasoning: User wants rural living experience (田舎暮らし体験) in Chinese. Tool returned Japan Heritage data (104 stories) which covers historic/cultural designations. Top results include Nagoya Castle, Sannai-Maruyama, Jo-an teahouse — none directly address rural homestay or village life experience.
missing_data: Agri-tourism villages, satoyama experiences, 農家民宿 (farm stays), rural life programs. Japan Heritage stories could be relevant but need filtering by rural/satoyama theme.
improvement_hint: Add theme_filter for satoyama/rural to get_japan_heritage. Consider a dedicated get_experiences tool or add experience_type field to scrape data.

reasoning: Korean-language query about autumn foliage. Returns 140 matches including sakura_meisho_100 kind entries (Kenroku-en, Matsumae Castle, Himeji Castle) and dedicated momiji spots. Good geographic spread, heritage designations present. Query language handled. Some top items name-match 紅葉 literally rather than by kind.
missing_data: Korean-language descriptions for most items. Best known momiji hotspots (Kyoto Tofuku-ji, Nikko) are not at top of results.
improvement_hint: Add kind_tag=momiji_meisho to complement sakura_meisho_100. Korean descriptions would make results more immediately useful.

reasoning: User wants a quiet non-touristy meditation place. Tool returns 修行-named spots but also includes ninja experience at Akame-48 Falls, Rinzai-ji special viewing event — these are events/tourist experiences, not quiet retreat temples. The 'not touristy' constraint is not respected.
missing_data: Zen sesshin programs, forest meditation spots, remote mountain temples with zazen programs. No filter for crowd_band=low meditation-specific places.
improvement_hint: Add zazen/meditation kind_tag. Enable crowd_band filter in search_area so low-crowd venues can be prioritized for retreat-seeking queries.

reasoning: User wants to see auroras in Japan. Japan has extremely rare aurora sightings at high latitudes only. Tool returns observatories, national parks (including Okinawa — wrong direction), and a ropeway via kinds_class_match — none address auroras specifically. The server should ideally clarify auroras are not reliably viewable in Japan.
missing_data: Hokkaido dark-sky sites explicitly linked to aurora probability; note that Japan is not a reliable aurora destination. Kushiro Shitsugen wetland is geographically plausible but no aurora-specific info.
wrong_data: Okinawa national parks and Iriomote park shown — these are tropical, the opposite direction for aurora viewing.
improvement_hint: Add aurora_possible flag to dark_sky entities in Hokkaido. Include a fallback note when no aurora-specific results exist, pointing to Hokkaido northernmost locations.

reasoning: User wants to sleep in a 100-year-old house (古民家). Tool returns Gifu hotels: mostly onsen ryokan (hitouyu kai) and generic OSM accommodation. No kominka (古民家) filter or tagging exists; the highly relevant Shirakawa-go and Gokayama farmhouses in Gifu are not surfaced.
missing_data: Kominka stays, gassho-zukuri farmhouse accommodations in Shirakawa-go/Gokayama. Hotel tool lacks lodging_type=kominka or heritage_building filter.
improvement_hint: Add kominka/heritage_lodging as a lodging_type. Tag Shirakawa-go area accommodations. Consider adding age_of_building metadata from official tourism registries.

reasoning: Thai query asks for non-touristy cherry blossom spots. Tool returns 215 sakura matches including sakura_meisho_100 listed sites (Kenroku-en, Himeji Castle, Matsumae Castle) — these are famous/touristy places, not hidden spots. The 'not crowded' constraint is not honored.
missing_data: Less-known sakura spots, parks with low crowd_band. No filtering by obscurity or crowd level. No Thai-language descriptions.
improvement_hint: Enable crowd_band=low filter in search_area. Add Thai descriptions for sakura_meisho_100 items. Consider a separate 'hidden gems' tier below must_see/notable.

reasoning: Photography/dramatic landscape query. Returns 53 matches with relevant 絶景 content — DMO curated routes (Ehime, Niigata), specific named spots (waterfalls, sea, mountains). Mix of structured scrape and Wikidata. Good geographic spread. Some items are lists/collections rather than single destinations but still useful.
missing_data: Coordinates for some scrape-source items. English-language descriptions for Japanese-heavy scrape content.
improvement_hint: Extract individual spot names from collection-type scrape items. Add en descriptions to higher-tier DMO feature pages for photography themes.

reasoning: Arabic query wants outdoor hot springs in nature, not hotels. Tool returns onsen spots including hotel facilities (見奈良天然温泉利楽 is a large resort spa) — these violate the 'not hotels' constraint. Some results like 宝泉坊温泉 match well. No Arabic descriptions available.
missing_data: Rotenburo-only (露天専用) natural settings, wild onsen (野湯) entries. Constraint 'not in hotels' unfiltered. Arabic descriptions absent.
improvement_hint: Add lodging_type=none or rotenburo_only flag to onsen spots. Tag natural/outdoor-only baths. Arabic translations for onsen descriptions would significantly improve usability.

reasoning: User wants to swim with wild dolphins. Top result is 'Kyoto Prefecture Cultural Ambassador' page — completely irrelevant. Second result is Notojima Aquarium (captive dolphins). Third result is a fish market. No wild dolphin swim spots surfaced. Mikurajima (御蔵島) and Ogasawara — the primary wild dolphin swimming sites — are absent.
missing_data: 御蔵島 (Mikurajima), 小笠原 (Ogasawara), 天草 (Amakusa) wild dolphin swim experiences — the key destinations for this activity in Japan.
wrong_data: Top result (Kyoto cultural ambassador page) is noise. Aquarium content mismatches 'wild' constraint.
improvement_hint: Add dolphin_swim/wild_dolphin kind_tag to Mikurajima and Ogasawara entries. Improve retrieval so irrelevant cultural ambassador pages are not top-ranked for dolphin queries.

reasoning: User asks for traditional architecture untouched by modernization (重伝建 intent). Tool returns Japan Heritage data: top results are Jo-an teahouse (Inuyama), Nagoya Castle, Sannai-Maruyama archaeological site. These are heritage sites but not the preservation districts (重伝建) the user likely meant. Shirakawa-go, Tsumago, Gion Shimbashi absent from top.
missing_data: Important Preservation Districts for Groups of Traditional Buildings (重要伝統的建造物群保存地区) should be primary results. These are tagged heritage_designations=Q850649 but not surfaced.
improvement_hint: When query mentions 'traditional architecture untouched', prioritize preservation_district kind and Q850649 heritage designation. Add get_preservation_districts tool or filter parameter.

reasoning: Vietnamese query about Ainu culture in Hokkaido. Excellent: top results are Ainu Museum (Shiraoi Porotokotan), National Ainu Museum, Nibutani Ainu Culture Museum, Hokkaido Ainu Center, Kawamura Kaneto Museum — all directly relevant, all in Hokkaido, with coordinates and websites. Precisely addresses the intent.
missing_data: Vietnamese-language descriptions would make this more accessible. Upopoy National Park context would be useful for the agent.
improvement_hint: Add Vietnamese descriptions to top Ainu entries. Link National Ainu Museum (Upopoy) more prominently in result metadata.

reasoning: Query about cliff-carved Buddhist statues (磨崖仏). Top results: Usuki Stone Buddhas (National Treasure), Oya-dera, Komasaka Magaibutsu, Kiyomizu Magaibutsu — all directly on-topic with high-quality heritage designations. Geographic diversity (Oita, Tochigi, Shiga, Kagoshima). Excellent retrieval.
missing_data: English descriptions for some items (null). Visit logistics (access from nearest station) missing but not expected from MCP.
improvement_hint: Add English descriptions to magaibutsu entries via Claude translation pass. Include access_note field from DMO sources.

reasoning: Query asks for day-trip volcano hikes from Tokyo. Returns Mt. Iwate (Iwate prefecture, 5+ hrs from Tokyo), Mt. Fuji (feasible day trip), Lake Towada (Aomori, too far), Mt. Unzen (Nagasaki, impossible day trip). No Tokyo-proximity filtering applied. Only Fuji and possibly Oshima are realistic day trips.
missing_data: Distance/travel-time from Tokyo metadata. Izu Oshima (active volcano, ferry from Tokyo), Mt. Mihara, Hakone volcanic zone. Tokyo-proximity filter not applied.
wrong_data: Mt. Unzen (Nagasaki) and Mt. Iwate (Iwate) presented without noting they cannot be done as day trips from Tokyo.
improvement_hint: Add travel_time_from_tokyo field or enable geographic proximity filter. Tag volcanoes with region so Tokyo-based queries can filter to Kanto/nearby.

reasoning: Indonesian query for freshly-made tofu at a temple (寺で豆腐体験). Tool returns GI-certified frozen tofu product, island tofu (壱州豆腐) info article, and a mountain tofu shop near Kongosan — these are food items, not temple tofu experiences. Koya-san style shojin ryori with temple tofu is the intended answer.
missing_data: Temple tofu experiences (高野豆腐伝承館, Nanzen-ji yudofu, Koya-san shojin ryori). No experience_type=temple_food or shojin_ryori filter.
improvement_hint: Add shojin_ryori and temple_food kind_tags to relevant experiences. Link yudofu spots near Nanzen-ji and Koya-san explicitly to temple contexts.

reasoning: User wants fishing villages frozen in time. Top result is a Shizuoka sakura-ebi restaurant guide, second is Itoman fishing port (Okinawa active port), third is Teradomari fish market street — these are active commercial fishing areas, not 'frozen in time' heritage villages. Funaya (舟屋) villages like Ine, Sanriku coast traditional villages not surfaced.
missing_data: Ine no Funaya (京都・伊根), Yamagatsu/Sanriku fishing village heritage sites, fishing_village kind with preservation status.
wrong_data: Fourth result (Shirahama fishing port access prohibition notice) is completely unhelpful.
improvement_hint: Add fishing_village kind_tag linked to preservation_district status. Create dedicated result set for funaya/traditional fishing settlements. Filter out access-prohibition pages.

reasoning: User wants to learn washi papermaking from a master. Tool returns all 231 METI traditional crafts in craft category — first items are Nibutani Attus weaving (Ainu textile) and various silk fabrics. Actual washi papermaking entries exist in this list but are buried. User intent (hands-on learning from master) is not directly addressable by METI designation data alone.
missing_data: Washi UNESCO ICH recognition, actual workshop/experience venues for washi (越前和紙, 土佐和紙, 美濃和紙). Experience booking info absent.
improvement_hint: Add q-filter support to get_local_specialty to return washi-specific results first. Link METI craft designations to associated experience workshops from DMO scrape data.

reasoning: Query for period-drama-like scenery, tool retrieves 宿場 (post towns). Top results: Tsumago-juku (must_see, Q850649 preservation), Narai-juku, Seki-juku — all excellent historic post towns with heritage designations. DMO editorial content from Nagano adds narrative richness. Highly relevant, good coverage.
missing_data: Kyoto Gion, Kanazawa Higashi Chaya, Hida Folk Village — other cinematic historic districts. But shukuba focus is appropriate for this query.
improvement_hint: Cross-link shukuba results with nearby film-location tags if available from DMO content. Add Tokaido/Nakasendo route context to help agents build itineraries.

reasoning: Query asks for non-crowded beaches. Tool returns 115 beach results — top items include Naminoue Beach (Naha, very urban/busy), Hamasaka Sun Beach, Sandayama Beach (Miyako Island, popular). These are mostly known beaches; the 'not crowded' constraint is not filtered. Good geographic coverage but no crowd filtering.
missing_data: Crowd_band=low filter not applied. Remote beaches of Amami, Ogasawara, less-visited Kyushu/Shikoku coasts not at top. No English descriptions for most beach entries.
improvement_hint: Enable crowd_band filter in search_area. Prioritize beach entries with low crowd_band when query signals non-crowded preference. Add hakusha_seishou_100 (white sand) annotations.

reasoning: Query about old-school izakaya yokocho. Returns 74 matches including yokocho kind_tag results (Yokocho Park, Haikara't Yokocho, Naniwakuishimbo Yokocho). Relevant results appear. First result (Yokocho Park, Shinagawa) is a literal park rather than drinking alley, slightly off. Overall the corpus has relevant yokocho entries and surfaces them.
missing_data: Tokyo's Golden Gai, Osaka's Namba Sennichimae Dotonbori, Shinjuku Omoide Yokocho not explicitly surfaced in truncated view. English descriptions thin.
improvement_hint: Ensure Golden Gai and Omoide Yokocho are tagged yokocho kind. Improve ranking of true izakaya alleys over parks named 横丁.

reasoning: German query for rural Japan train travel. Returns 74 local_railway kind_tag results: Sagano Scenic Line, Oigawa Main Line (steam train), Nagano local line editorial content, Oga Line, Ou Main Line. Good variety of scenic/rural lines. German descriptions absent but structured data is solid.
missing_data: German-language descriptions. Iya Valley trains, Shimanto Torocco, Kumagawa Railway — scenic rural gems. Pass recommendations (JR local pass) absent.
improvement_hint: Add German translations for top local_railway entries. Tag lines by scenic_rating or pass_coverage to help agents recommend specific routes.

reasoning: Firefly viewing query. Top result is ホタルイカ (firefly squid — different animal!) with heritage designation, which could confuse the agent. However 美郷のホタル (Miyosato natural monument), Toyoda Firefly Museum, and Kitakyushu firefly viewing, Yamaguchi Hotaru-bune boat ride are all solid. Good coverage of actual firefly destinations despite top-item ambiguity.
missing_data: Clear labeling distinguishing ホタルイカ (squid) from ホタル (firefly insect). Season info (June) for firefly events.
wrong_data: ホタルイカ群遊海面 (firefly squid spawning) as top result is semantically misleading for a firefly-viewing query.
improvement_hint: Disambiguate ホタル (insect) vs ホタルイカ (squid) in kind_tags. Add seasonal_peak field for firefly spots (typically June). Deduplicate squid entries from insect firefly queries.

reasoning: Russian query for winter crane watching. Top result is Izumi crane migration grounds (Kagoshima, Special Natural Monument, Ramsar site, Oct-Mar) — the primary Japan crane wintering site. Tsurui-mura (Hokkaido) appears via Kushiro Shitsugen National Park. Excellent relevance for the top result with detailed English description and heritage designations.
missing_data: Tsurui-ito Tancho Sanctuary (鶴居・伊藤タンチョウサンクチュアリ) in Hokkaido not explicitly named. Russian descriptions absent. Municipality noise (Tsuruta-cho etc.) dilutes results.
improvement_hint: Add crane_wintering kind_tag to Tsurui entries in Hokkaido. Filter municipality results when attraction results exist for same query. Add Russian translations for top wildlife-watching entries.
